current_assets.description: Compact folded-path app icon or wordmark
Calm weekly planning board with cards, columns, and one highlighted focus lane
Small amber chip or rule used to emphasize current sprint focus

non_primary_assets.limits: Do not use as the logo, main hero, or dominant pattern.

selection_note: Use current_assets for active design choices unless deprecated_assets.json marks an item or direction as ineligible.
